posts.text: I woke up with ‘Mania on my Mind. This beat is so cold I had to kill it. Don’t trip Cody, minor setback for a major comeback and congrats to Jey for getting his first World Title! Inspired By Old Atlanta & TBS! #wrestling #codyrhodes #jeyuso #rap #atlanta
